message:
fix(providers): synthesize complete tool call event sequence when stream done arrives before start

openai_responses.rs:
- Fix end_tool_call() to emit a synthetic ToolCallStart event followed
  by a ToolCallDelta (if arguments are non-empty) when the "done" event
  arrives before the corresponding "added" event, ensuring downstream
  consumers always see a valid Start -> Delta? -> End sequence
- Previously, missed "added" events would produce an orphaned ToolCallEnd
  without a preceding Start, causing consumers to drop or misattribute
  the tool call
- Refactor the synthesized-vs-tracked path to use map_or_else with a
  (ToolCallState, bool) tuple for clearer control flow

Add test:
- test_stream_synthesizes_tool_call_start_when_done_arrives_first:
  verifies that a stream containing only "response.output_item.done"
  (no prior "added" event) correctly produces Start, Delta, and End
  events with the right content_index and parsed arguments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
